productDisplayName: Turtle Men Formal Black Tie, Cufflink and Pocket Square Combo Set
description: Combo Set turtle's silk tie with its matching kerchief and cufflinks instantly elevates your formal attire, with its luxe fabric and striking texture. One set of these to match your crisp shirt and you're all ready to suit up! Be it dinner dates or business meetings, this set is your fail-safe formal accessory option. Tie Length: 42.5" Black and yellow tie made of blended fabric Has a diagonal striping pattern Loop on tie inner to hold end in place Cufflinks Width: 3" Matching round cufflinks made of steel Hinged back to hold the cufflink in place Pocket square Square handkerchief with a 10" width Made of blended fabric with a matching pattern Tie and pocket square care Dry clean only
